thread: ToK pipeline operationalization + Loop Closure Methodology
context: Yu and Beta explored Zerone ToK mechanism in depth. Identified 5 open loops as the deeper pattern behind ToK gaps. Built LCM audit system (loop-audit.py) and ToK pipeline manager (tok.py). System health went from 39% to 87% in 3 audit cycles. 11 of 12 gaps closed. First full pipeline cycle completed: harvest of Opus/Sonnet/Haiku capabilities, distilled to testable assertions, verified via fast-track HIVE consensus, integrated into routing recommendation, impact measured. Alpha's TOK-MECHANISM.md is the strategic blueprint. Gamma is harvesting the ToK pipeline design. Lead coupling mechanism now wired into heartbeat.
direction: Continue closing remaining ToK pipeline gaps
Harvest knowledge from every significant model interaction
Verify pending ToK leaves via HIVE consensus (fast-track)
